case_title: JAN NAFTULIN VS. ROBERT "BOB" LARIVE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY NAFTULIN, JAN AS TO DEFENDANT LARIVE, ROBERT "BOB" DBA FIOR D' ITALIA INC. SMITH, SHEILA DBA WEBSTER PLANNING CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-12-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LARIVE, ROBERT "BOB" DBA FIOR D' ITALIA INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: HOLLI THIER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAFTULIN, JAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARIVE, ROBERT "BOB" DBA FIOR D' ITALIA INC. SMITH, SHEILA DBA WEBSTER PLANNING CORP. $601.16 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $711.16, $601.16 SHALL BE CREDITED TO MR. NAFTULIN'S 401K ACCOUNT, IF POSSIBLE. OTHERWISE DEFENDANT SHALL SEND MR. NAFTULIN A CHECK FOR THE ENTIRE AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LARIVE, ROBERT "BOB" DBA FIOR D' ITALIA INC. SMITH, SHEILA DBA WEBSTER PLANNING CORP.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-18-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, SHEILA DBA WEBSTER PLANNING CORP.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM HOLLI THIER FILED BY NAFTULIN, JAN LARIVE, ROBERT "BOB" DBA FIOR D' ITALIA INC. SMITH, SHEILA DBA WEBSTER PLANNING CORP.
